name: Speechmatics
description: Speechmatics speech-to-text Batch API for submitting transcription jobs, polling status, retrieving transcripts, deleting jobs, reading logs, and checking usage.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Speechmatics API key from the portal.

credential_fields.name: region
credential_fields.label: Batch Region
credential_fields.description: Speechmatics Batch region prefix: eu1, us1, au1, or enterprise regions eu2/us2.

tools.name: create_job
tools.description: Create a Speechmatics Batch transcription job. Provide `config` as the raw Speechmatics job config object. For URL-based transcription, include fetch_data.url inside config. For direct upload, also pass `data_file` as base64, data URL, or blob-rehydrated file.

config.description: Raw Speechmatics config JSON, for example {"type":"transcription","transcription_config":{"language":"en","operating_point":"enhanced","diarization":"speaker"},"fetch_data":{"url":"https://.../audio.mp3"}}.

data_file.description: Optional audio/video file content for direct upload. Use a blobref:// handle from a file tool when available, or base64/data URL.

data_file_filename.description: Optional filename used for the multipart upload.

tools.name: create_transcription_from_url
tools.description: Create a Speechmatics transcription job from a publicly reachable audio/video URL using a simple agent-friendly schema.

config.description: Speechmatics config object. Must include fetch_data.url and transcription_config. Example: {"type":"transcription","transcription_config":{"language":"en","operating_point":"enhanced"},"fetch_data":{"url":"https://example.com/audio.mp3"}}.

tools.name: list_jobs
tools.description: List Speechmatics Batch jobs in the configured region.

tools.name: get_job
tools.description: Get Speechmatics job details, including status, progress, and errors.

tools.name: get_transcript
tools.description: Get the transcript for a completed Speechmatics transcription job. Use format=json-v2 for structured output, txt for plain text, or srt/vtt for subtitles when enabled.

format.description: Transcript format such as json-v2, txt, srt, or vtt.

tools.name: get_transcript_text
tools.description: Get a plain-text transcript for a completed Speechmatics job.

tools.name: get_job_log
tools.description: Get the Speechmatics log file for a job.

tools.name: delete_job
tools.description: Delete a Speechmatics job and remove associated resources.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Get Speechmatics Batch usage statistics for the configured region.

tools.name: create_temporary_key
tools.description: Create a temporary Speechmatics key for client-side Batch or Realtime use. For Batch, include client_ref when exposing the key to end users.

type.description: Temporary key type: batch or rt.

client_ref.description: Optional client reference. Recommended for browser-exposed Batch keys.

region.description: Optional Batch region: eu, usa, or au.
